allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for item in data[:20]: cats = [a['value'] for a in item.get\('metadata',{}\).get\('attributes',[]\) if a.get\('trait_type'\) in \('Category','Type'\)] print\(item['name'], '|', '|'.join\(cats\), '|', item['model_file_url']\) ")
